18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Amazon.com
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance; Increased durability, increased air flow, and intuitive connection; Available in 9 colors
18.extractionRationale: The source explicitly identifies one distinct third-party accessory product: the Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit designed for Clik Valve. The 9 color variants represent the same product in different colors, not separate products.

36.evidenceText: Only a pump head adapter is required for easy inflation with a single click. ... adapter for the Schwalbe CLIK VALVE can simply be screwed onto the car valve.
36.extractionRationale: The provided evidence describes product functionality and mentions that a pump head adapter is needed, but does not contain quantifiable data about the fraction of Clik valve product pages that display related accessories in 'frequently bought together' or 'related products' sections. To extract an attach rate, multiple product pages would need to be analyzed to determine what percentage show these accessory recommendations. A single product description page is insufficient.

37.evidenceText: CoreCap is available in six different colors. Products mentioned: CoreCap AL Tubeless Valve Set and CoreCap Valve Cap Upgrade Set
37.extractionRationale: The source does not provide a complete, explicit count of all distinct replacement/spare part SKUs including valve cores, seals, o-rings, and replacement kits. While it mentions color variants and 2 main products, a comprehensive SKU inventory is not provided.

45.evidenceText: The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims, to ensure a perfect seal for long, hassle-free rides.
45.extractionRationale: DT Swiss promotes their own proprietary tubeless valve as standard, with no mention of Clik valve adoption. The single provided source does not contain evidence of Clik adoption by any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval), nor any information about 2026 or 2027 product lines. Therefore, zero major brands have demonstrably adopted Clik valve as standard.

57.evidenceText: Product listings on BIKE24 show CoreCap products (BTI-165 and BTI-166) but contain no stock status dates, 'back in stock' indicators, or restock turnaround information.
57.extractionRationale: The sources provided only contain product feature descriptions and listings. There is no explicit information about out-of-stock dates, back-in-stock dates, or B2B restock turnaround times that would allow calculation of a specific value.
